channel.title: AP News - US News
channel.description: Top US News stories from AP News

item.title: 3 firefighters killed, 2 injured while tackling wildfires on the Colorado-Utah border
item.description: Three firefighters have died and two were injured while battling fires on the Colorado-Utah border. The U.S.

item.title: The military is searching for a US Marine missing off the coast of California
4 dead amid flooding caused by heavy rains, Kentucky governor says
